api: Whisky Hunter public API (OpenAPI/Swagger 2.0 spec at https://whiskyhunter.net/api/?format=openapi)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-confirmed against the live drf-yasg-generated OpenAPI 2.0 document (https://whiskyhunter.net/api/?format=openapi, fetched 2026-07-03) and every live JSON response it documents. The real Whisky Hunter public API publishes exactly 5 GET endpoints, all read-only and unauthenticated. This bundle covers all 5 and also restores the two legacy stream names (`auctions` and `distilleries`) as aliases over the same legacy paths so callers using the hand-written connector's stream names continue to receive the same raw records. There is no write capability of any kind.
